description: Explore and evaluate bleeding-edge model architectures for NZ legal NLP: MoR, TTT-Linear/RNN, Mamba-3/SSD, DiffusionGemma, SambaY, nex-agi models, MiMo-V2.5, DeVestral, TiRex. Phase 7 adds 2026 architectures: ModernBERT, Jamba 1.6, Llama 4/Gemma 3 MoE, RAG 2.0, DeepSeek-V3/R1, SSM encoders, test-time compute scaling.
oracle_notes: Repo-side Track 21 implementation is complete: architecture candidate registry, deterministic example metrics, Pareto frontier and weighted ranking helpers, provisional architecture comparison report, audit-only shell entrypoints, acceptance evidence helpers, script contract tests, expanded 2026 candidate coverage, and an explicit external gate manifest. All live third-party setup, model/dataset downloads, CUDA/GPU execution, measured NZ legal benchmark outputs, profiler traces, production backbone replacement decisions, and Hugging Face publication remain external gates.
